title: Midnight Crumble Bites
description: A sweet and crunchy bite-sized dessert perfect for snacking. The midnight oats add a mysterious depth to the crumble.
instructions: In a bowl, combine oat and crumble.
Add chocolate chips and mix until well combined.
Cut dates in half and add to the bowl, mixing gently.
Spoon the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Form into small balls and bake for 12-15 minutes.
Let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Store in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
